description: Dowry evaluation (taqwīm). Wife: Sitt al-Bahāʾ bt. Yakhin. Husband: Yefet b. Saʿadya. Location: Malīj. Dated: 8 Adar II 1445 Seleucid = 5 March 1134 CE. Marriage payments: 6 + 20. Total sum (including dowry): 90 dinars. Witnesses: Yefet b. Shelomo; Peraḥya b. Ṭarfon ha-Kohen; Meshullam b. Menashshe; Yosef b. Yaʿaqov he-Ḥazzan. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
